'''鈭歝h-h-l''' ('''kachahal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:heapsort|heapsort]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-h-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:heapsort|heapsort]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-h-l
|-
! Lemma
| kachahal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichahal|thichahal]] || [[word:jichahal|jichahal]] || [[word:shichahal|shichahal]] || [[word:kichahal|kichahal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchahal|thuthuchahal]] || [[word:jujuchahal|jujuchahal]] || [[word:shushuchahal|shushuchahal]] || [[word:kukuchahal|kukuchahal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchahal|thuchahal]] || [[word:juchahal|juchahal]] || [[word:shuchahal|shuchahal]] || [[word:kuchahal|kuchahal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchahal|thuchahal]] || [[word:juchahal|juchahal]] || [[word:shuchahal|shuchahal]] || [[word:kuchahal|kuchahal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechahal|thechahal]] || [[word:jechahal|jechahal]] || [[word:shechahal|shechahal]] || [[word:kechahal|kechahal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochahal|thothochahal]] || [[word:jojochahal|jojochahal]] || [[word:shoshochahal|shoshochahal]] || [[word:kokochahal|kokochahal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochahal|thochahal]] || [[word:jochahal|jochahal]] || [[word:shochahal|shochahal]] || [[word:kochahal|kochahal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochahal|thochahal]] || [[word:jochahal|jochahal]] || [[word:shochahal|shochahal]] || [[word:kochahal|kochahal]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chahal|chahal]] || [[word:chahal|chahal]] || [[word:chahal|chahal]] || [[word:chahal|chahal]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chahal|chahal]] || [[word:chahal|chahal]] || [[word:chahal|chahal]] || [[word:chahal|chahal]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chahal|chahal]] || [[word:chahal|chahal]] || [[word:chahal|chahal]] || [[word:chahal|chahal]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chahal|chahal]] || [[word:chahal|chahal]] || [[word:chahal|chahal]] || [[word:chahal|chahal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙chahal|th忙chahal]] || [[word:j忙chahal|j忙chahal]] || [[word:sh忙chahal|sh忙chahal]] || [[word:k忙chahal|k忙chahal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachahal|thathachahal]] || [[word:jajachahal|jajachahal]] || [[word:shashachahal|shashachahal]] || [[word:kakachahal|kakachahal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachahal|thachahal]] || [[word:jachahal|jachahal]] || [[word:shachahal|shachahal]] || [[word:kachahal|kachahal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachahal|thachahal]] || [[word:jachahal|jachahal]] || [[word:shachahal|shachahal]] || [[word:kachahal|kachahal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachahal|shachahal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachahal|goshachahal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachahal|gokishachahal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachahaln眉|shachahaln眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachahalnkn眉|goshachahalnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachahaln眉|gokishachahaln眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachahalsh毛|shachahalsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachahalnksh毛|goshachahalnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachahalsh毛|gokishachahalsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachahalro|shachahalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachahalnkro|goshachahalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachahalro|gokishachahalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachahalmu|shachahalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachahalnkmu|goshachahalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachahalmu|gokishachahalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachahalsher|shachahalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachahalnksher|goshachahalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachahalsher|gokishachahalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachahalng|shachahalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachahalnkng|goshachahalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachahalng|gokishachahalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachahalya|shachahalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachahalnkya|goshachahalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachahalya|gokishachahalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachahalyam|shachahalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachahalnkyam|goshachahalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachahalyam|gokishachahalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachahaln眉sh毛|shachahaln眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachahalnkn眉sh毛|goshachahalnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachahaln眉sh毛|gokishachahaln眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachahaln眉ro|shachahaln眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachahalnkn眉ro|goshachahalnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachahaln眉ro|gokishachahaln眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachahaln眉mu|shachahaln眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachahalnkn眉mu|goshachahalnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachahaln眉mu|gokishachahaln眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachahalsh毛n眉|shachahalsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachahalnksh毛n眉|goshachahalnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachahalsh毛n眉|gokishachahalsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachahalsh毛ro|shachahalsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachahalnksh毛ro|goshachahalnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachahalsh毛ro|gokishachahalsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachahalsh毛mu|shachahalsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachahalnksh毛mu|goshachahalnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachahalsh毛mu|gokishachahalsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachahalron眉|shachahalron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachahalnkron眉|goshachahalnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachahalron眉|gokishachahalron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachahalrosh毛|shachahalrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachahalnkrosh毛|goshachahalnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachahalrosh毛|gokishachahalrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachahalromu|shachahalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachahalnkromu|goshachahalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachahalromu|gokishachahalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachahalmun眉|shachahalmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachahalnkmun眉|goshachahalnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachahalmun眉|gokishachahalmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachahalmush毛|shachahalmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachahalnkmush毛|goshachahalnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachahalmush毛|gokishachahalmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachahalmuro|shachahalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachahalnkmuro|goshachahalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachahalmuro|gokishachahalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
